content:
IVX ENTERPRISE AUTONOMOUS INTELLIGENCE — FINAL PLATFORM

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION

Transform IVX into an enterprise autonomous operating platform.

Do not build another chatbot.

Build an autonomous engineering, business intelligence, and operations platform.

==================================
PHASE 1 — ENTERPRISE ORCHESTRATOR
==================================

Create a central Orchestrator.

Responsibilities:

- prioritize work
- schedule agents
- detect blockers
- recover failed jobs
- monitor all systems
- coordinate every agent

==================================
PHASE 2 — SPECIALIZED AGENTS
==================================

Run coordinated agents:

1. Senior Developer
2. Frontend Engineer
3. Backend Engineer
4. Database Engineer
5. Deployment Engineer
6. QA Engineer
7. Security Engineer
8. Performance Engineer
9. AI Research Agent
10. Business Opportunity Agent
11. Real Estate Market Agent
12. Investor Relations Agent
13. Marketing Agent
14. Documentation Agent

Each agent reports to the Orchestrator.

==================================
PHASE 3 — GLOBAL AI RESEARCH
==================================

Every day:

Research worldwide:

- AI models
- AI startups
- research papers
- enterprise software
- real estate technology
- investment technology
- construction technology
- automation
- robotics
- fintech

Produce:

- opportunities
- competitor analysis
- technologies worth adopting
- implementation priority
- expected business impact

==================================
PHASE 4 — BUSINESS OPPORTUNITY ENGINE
==================================

Continuously search for:

- investors
- acquisition opportunities
- strategic partnerships
- distressed assets
- government programs
- grants
- enterprise customers
- commercial real estate opportunities

Score every opportunity.

==================================
PHASE 5 — SELF IMPROVEMENT
==================================

Continuously evaluate:

- failures
- deployment incidents
- production issues
- performance
- user feedback

Create improvement tasks automatically.

==================================
PHASE 6 — LIVE OPERATIONS CENTER
==================================

Dashboard includes:

- GitHub
- Render
- Supabase
- Health
- Active deployments
- Agent status
- Queue
- Errors
- Business opportunities
- AI research
- Executive KPIs

==================================
PHASE 7 — ENTERPRISE MEMORY
==================================

Maintain persistent knowledge of:

- architecture
- deployment history
- recurring issues
- successful fixes
- coding standards
- business decisions

Use this knowledge in future work.

==================================
PHASE 8 — GOVERNANCE
==================================

Before high-impact actions:

- verify evidence
- record audit trail
- log reasoning
- enforce approvals where required

Never report COMPLETE without production evidence.

==================================
PHASE 9 — EXECUTIVE REPORT
==================================

Every 5 hours produce:

Engineering:
- completed work
- deployments
- blockers
- health

Business:
- new opportunities
- investor leads
- market intelligence
- technology discoveries

AI:
- new models
- new frameworks
- recommended upgrades

==================================
SUCCESS CRITERIA
==================================

IVX is complete only when:

- Autonomous engineering operates reliably.
- Business intelligence runs continuously.
- Research identifies new technologies daily.
- All actions are observable and auditable.
- Production evidence accompanies deployments.
- Executive reports are generated automatically.
